The '''''Tropsobor''''' was an [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The ''Tropsobor'' delivered [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avenger]] prototypes to [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']] near [[Gerbaud 2]] during the [[Sepan campaign]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
